How It Works

From signup to interviews in days

We handle the entire application process so you can focus on preparing and acing your interviews.

1
Share your profile
Upload your resume and tell us your target roles, industries, and locations.
2
We apply daily
Our team submits 20–25 tailored applications every weekday to top employers.
3
Track everything
See every application in your live dashboard. Weekly reports every Friday.
4
Land the offer
We support interview prep until you sign your offer letter.

Built for serious job seekers

Epicapplys was founded to solve the biggest problem in modern job searching: volume without burnout.

Why We Exist

The average job seeker sends 5–10 applications per week. Top companies receive hundreds per role. The math doesn't work unless you dramatically increase your volume. Epicapplys was created to level that playing field by applying to 20–25 roles every single weekday on your behalf.

How We're Different

We're not a resume service or a job board. We're a dedicated application team that learns your profile, targets the right companies, tailors every submission, and tracks results — so you can stay focused on interview prep and networking.

Our Values

Volume with Quality

More applications, never at the cost of relevance.

Transparency

You see every application we submit, every day.

Candidate-First

Your goals drive every decision we make.

Results-Driven

We measure success by your interview rate.

We apply to 20–25 full-time jobs daily so you can focus on interviews.
